## Scientific impact

- [ ] No scientific interpretation changes.
- [ ] Protocol changes are documented in an ADR.
- [ ] Test access and selection status are unchanged or explicitly disclosed.

## Validation

- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make typecheck`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make validate`
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Registry/manifests updated when results changed
